creator: matt@LUCIDA.CA
text:
All versions of the 'analog' package below 4.16 contain a buffer overflow
that can be remotely exploited. The relevent URL for this bug is:

http://www.analog.cx/security2.html

The version of analog in ports-current was 4.11, this patch upgrades the
port to version 4.16 which contains the fix as well as some enhancements
in foreign language support and OS detection.

How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
